title: Chita Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Chita with a Z-Score of -3.49. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Chita are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high number of heating degree days (HDD) at 13.2 GG, while cooling degree days (CDD) are at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 56% and the wind speed is moderate at 7.7 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap
